author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Arrest made after man threatens to blow up Nintendo’s headquarters

Reports are emerging from Japan that a 27-year-old unemployed man has been arrested for threating to blow up Nintendo’s headquarters. Kyoto police made the arrest today, May 12. The man was arrested on grounds of suspected obstruction of business. In envelopes sent to Nintendo, the man included messages such as “I’m going to blow you all up” and “My plans...

The post Arrest made after man threatens to blow up Nintendo’s headquarters appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
List of all Nintendo Switch 2 games with a game-key card release

Following the launch of Nintendo Switch 2, we’re putting together a complete list of Nintendo Switch 2 games with a game-key card release. This is a new approach to physical media, which has seen a mixed reaction. In a way, it’s a hybrid between a true physical release and a download code. Each box comes with a cartridge, but there’s...

The post List of all Nintendo Switch 2 games with a game-key card release appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Captain Tsubasa 2: World Fighters shares Nintendo Switch release date, story trailer

Bandai Namco just provided the latest on Captain Tsubasa 2: World Fighters, confirming the release date on Nintendo Switch 2 and offering up a new story trailer. The company is putting the game out on August 28, 2026. Those who pre-order will receive the 2026 Japan National Team & World Youth Jersey Set, immediate access to the playable Brazil Youth...

The post Captain Tsubasa 2: World Fighters shares Nintendo Switch release date, story trailer appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Brotato “All Pain No Gain” update announced, patch notes – Nightmare difficulty, new character, weapon, more

Today, “All Pain No Gain” was revealed as the latest update for Brotato. Expect to see it soon on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. The update adds the Nightmare difficulty level with exclusive enemies, the Wounded as a new character, the Rail gun as a new weapon, and a couple of new achievements. That’s on top of various balance adjustments....

The post Brotato “All Pain No Gain” update announced, patch notes – Nightmare difficulty, new character, weapon, more appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Spooky Spirit Shooting Gallery to receive Nintendo Switch 2 version

Spooky Spirit Shooting Gallery has been announced to receive a Nintendo Switch 2 Edition by publisher Nippon Columbia. The Nintendo Switch 2 Edition of the game will release on August 6, 2026 in Japan. The Nintendo Switch 2 version of the software will incorporate local GameShare, and online GameShare via GameChat. Japan will also be getting a physical version of...

The post Spooky Spirit Shooting Gallery to receive Nintendo Switch 2 version appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Little Kitty, Big City “Birthday Bash” update out now, patch notes – new content and more

Little Kitty, Big City is celebrating its second anniversary with a free “Birthday Bash” update, which is out now on Nintendo Switch. The patch features new birthday-themed content, an expanded apartment with a new NPC, a new hat, and other content. It’s also now possible to start the game as your custom cat and play through the entire adventure with...

The post Little Kitty, Big City “Birthday Bash” update out now, patch notes – new content and more appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Monster Crown: Sin Eater will have a physical version on Nintendo Switch

Today, Red Art Games announced that it’s preparing a physical version of Monster Crown: Sin Eater for Nintendo Switch. It’s due out on September 3, 2026 in Europe. Only a standard edition is planned. However, each copy includes a double-sided poster, so you’ll get a little something alongside the game. Monster Crown: Sin Eater just recently launched on the Nintendo...

The post Monster Crown: Sin Eater will have a physical version on Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Farming Simulator gains ModHub on Nintendo Switch 2, over 4,000 mods available

Starting today, Farming Simulator: Signature Edition players on Nintendo Switch 2 can access the game’s ModHub. This is the first time the feature has been available on Nintendo’s console. ModHub lets players enjoy mods to extend and customize their virtual farms. Over 4,000 modifications are available to download directly in-game. These feature more maps, machines, and gameplay that are user-generated...

The post Farming Simulator gains ModHub on Nintendo Switch 2, over 4,000 mods available appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Harvest Moon: Echoes of Teradea gets Nintendo Switch and Switch 2 release date

Publisher Natsume has just announced the release date for Harvest Moon: Echoes of Teradea on both Nintendo Switch and Switch 2, marking the franchise’s first title on Nintendo’s new hardware. The game launches on September 24, with physical editions also confirmed for both consoles. The game will feature different romance options, new exploration abilities, and more. Players will embark on...

The post Harvest Moon: Echoes of Teradea gets Nintendo Switch and Switch 2 release date appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Absolum has just received cross-play support

Publisher Dotemu has just announced a very special addition to its game, Absolum. In an update that is now available for players, the game now supports full cross-play, including on Nintendo Switch! The news was shared through the game’s official X account alongside a message from the developers on the Steam page. Check it out: We know our Rebels have...

The post Absolum has just received cross-play support appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
The Necromancer’s Tale secures Nintendo Switch 2 release date, new trailer

Silver Lining Interactive and Psychic Software just put out the release date for The Necromancer’s Tale. On Nintendo Switch 2, the game arrives on June 24, 2026. The Necromancer’s Tale, a story-rich gothic RPG, was previously announced for Nintendo Switch 2 back in March. Previously, we were given a vague 2026 release window. Those that missed our previous report can...

The post The Necromancer’s Tale secures Nintendo Switch 2 release date, new trailer appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Pokemon Winds and Waves get official behind the scenes main theme recording video

A new video has just come online offering a behind-the-scenes look at the recording of the main theme for Pokemon Winds and Waves. The track was performed by the NHK Symphony Orchestra. The Pokemon Company says the theme “signals the beginning of a brand‑new adventure.” Pokemon Winds and Waves were announced during Pokemon Day earlier this year. We don’t know...

The post Pokemon Winds and Waves get official behind the scenes main theme recording video appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
3D platformer Garfield: Escape from Monday announced for Nintendo Switch

Microids, along with OSome Studio, today unveiled Garfield: Escape from Monday for Nintendo Switch. The game is due out on September 24, 2026. Garfield: Escape from Monday is a “veggie filled” 3D platformer. In it, players will need to help the tabby cat wake up from his nightmare by exploring different worlds. More information can be found in the following...

The post 3D platformer Garfield: Escape from Monday announced for Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Tales of Arise: Beyond the Dawn Edition gets Law character trailer

Yet another character trailer has dropped for Tales of Arise: Beyond the Dawn Edition, and for today’s video, Bandai Namco is showing off Law. Law is a young man who’s with Cyslodia’s Bureau of Observation and is tasked with pursuing dissidents. He excels in hand-to-hand combat with fast, relentless attacks. Law also isn’t easily staggered. Here’s an overview of the...

The post Tales of Arise: Beyond the Dawn Edition gets Law character trailer appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Master of Monsters: Disciples of Gaia is this week’s Console Archives on Nintendo Switch 2

As announced by Hamster, Master of Monsters: Disciples of Gaia is about to launch on Nintendo Switch 2 via Console Archives. It comes out tomorrow, May 13. Master of Monsters: Disciples of Gaia was originally released by Toshiba-Emi. The game, which first debuted in 1997, is a war sim title. Here’s some additional information: Master of Monsters: Disciples of Gaia...

The post Master of Monsters: Disciples of Gaia is this week’s Console Archives on Nintendo Switch 2 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Mr. Do is this week’s Arcade Archives game on Nintendo Switch 2, Switch

Today, it was announced that Mr. Do is joining the Arcade Archives line on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. The game arrives on May 14. Mr. Do originally came out in 1982. The action game has players controlling a clown as they go through stages by taking down monsters and collecting cherries. Here’s some additional information: Mr. Do is an...

text:
BioShock creator says Nintendo Switch 2 proves gaming graphics are hitting “diminishing returns”

Ken Levine, creator of BioShock, recently used the Nintendo Switch 2 as an example while criticizing the gaming industry’s increasing obsession with graphical realism, arguing that the medium has reached a point of “diminishing returns” when it comes to visuals. Speaking with IGN, Levine discussed how modern games continue to chase photorealism, but believes players and developers alike are starting...

The post BioShock creator says Nintendo Switch 2 proves gaming graphics are hitting “diminishing returns” appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
